title: LCX8 P2-T03 Client component/API action source trace
scope: Trace ClientsSurface, Client data/import/report subpanels, and their apiClient/hrxApiClient boundaries into existing LCX8 Client rows. No new visible action rows were added; statuses remain pre-P3/P4 classifications.

lazyweb_reference.query: enterprise command center quick actions dashboard; enterprise app topbar sidebar search notifications
lazyweb_reference.use: Reference only; local Client source/API trace drives classifications.

anchors.description: CLIENTS_PERMISSION_REF and CLIENT_SECTIONS define Client route/permission scope
renderLiveState maps loading/error/denied/review/empty states
refreshToken effects fetch Client master data, legal people backlinks, CRM/intake, account/contact, merge proposal, and account-contact reads
record-action field registry and audit reads for selected Client
Client write handlers for opportunity handoff, conflict/clearance, accounts, contacts, merge, and record actions
PageHeader refresh and currentSection rendering for Client list/leads/opportunities/intake/accounts/contacts/data/reports/import panels
Import read effects and write handlers for job creation, source staging, mapping, dry-run, execute, rollback/error report
Visible import action buttons and guarded result states
Data Cloud provider/profile/results/audit read effect
Provider, consent, enrichment job, execute, identity, and segment handlers
Visible Client data/enrichment action buttons and guarded results
Report definitions, Client profitability, and report audit read effect
Report create/patch/profitability/run/share handlers
Visible report, profitability, run, share, and audit controls
Panel renders shared overflow icon-button without onClick handler
fetchMasterDataRecords Client master-data read
Data Cloud provider/consent/enrichment/profile/identity/segment API clients
Import data targets/jobs/create/stage/preview/mapping/dry-run/execute/rollback/error-report API clients
Record-action runtime, fields/audit reads, field-update and bulk-update writes
CRM/intake collection reads and account/contact/merge/opportunity/conflict/clearance writes
Client profitability analytics read/write API clients
Report runtime read/write API clients
fetchLegalPeopleSearch for Client contact backlink read

row_updates.handler: onClick -> setRefreshToken(value + 1); ClientsSurface useEffect fetchers re-run Client, legal-people backlink, CRM/intake, account/contact, merge, and record-action reads
row_updates.api_route: GET /master-data/records; GET /api/hrx/legal-people/search?client_id=client_lcx_001; GET /api/crm/leads; GET /api/crm/opportunities; GET /api/intake/requests; GET /api/intake/audit; GET /api/crm/accounts; GET /api/crm/contacts; GET /api/crm/duplicate-merge-proposals; GET /api/crm/accounts/:account_id/contacts; GET /api/record-actions/client/fields; GET /api/record-actions/client/:record_id/audit

known_gaps_preserved: No Client row was promoted to PASS during P2-T03.
LCX8-ACTION-0115 remains FAIL because the shared Panel overflow icon has no handler.
API read/write rows remain BLOCKED until P3/P4 browser/API/audit proof exists.
Guarded UI states remain GUARDED but still require API response trimming proof in P4.
non_claims: This trace does not prove live API success, writes, audit persistence, production readiness, public launch approval, or owner approval.
No external provider/Data Cloud/report/share/import execution receipt is claimed.
